certificate_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the DMS certificate.

certificate_creation_date.description: The date when the DMS certificate was created.

certificate_owner.description: The owner of the DMS certificate.

id.description: The unique identifier for the DMS certificate.

key_length.description: The length of the encryption key used by the DMS certificate.

signing_algorithm.description: The algorithm used to sign the DMS certificate.

tags.description: A map of tags associated with the DMS certificate.

valid_from_date.description: The date from which the DMS certificate is valid.

valid_to_date.description: The date until which the DMS certificate remains valid.
